# API Checklist: Standardize POI categories across sources

**Purpose**: Validate standardization API contracts for triggering runs and inspecting status.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/020-standardize-poi-categories/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Trigger Contract

- [x] CHK-API-001 Endpoint accepts manual or scheduled trigger with taxonomy/mapping versions.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Request validation rejects invalid taxonomy or mapping versions.

## Status Contract

- [x] CHK-API-003 Status response includes mapping quality metrics and conflict counts.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Status response includes run identifiers and timestamps.

## Failure States

- [x] CHK-API-005 Failure responses include actionable error details.
- [x] CHK-API-006 Promotion failures do not present production as updated.
